content.en:
"Ten Thousand Dao Blades!"

Ye Tian struck a blow, except for not using the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword, it can be said that he did not have the slightest hand.

Bang!!!

Yun Li's controller hurriedly took Ye Tian's move, and was directly shocked away.

"I didn't expect you to be weak!"

Yun Li's controller said solemnly.

Immediately, Yunli also began to get serious, and his breath exploded.

At this time, Ye Tian could sense how many chains he had broken.

"Five Chains of Pole Building!"

Ye Tian was slightly surprised.

He had only broken the fourth chain of creation.

However, he has created more Extreme Creation Perfection Techniques, and he has a large number of Perfection-level Ancestral Endowments, both of which are terrifying in terms of foundation potential, so in the case of a difference of one Extreme Creation Chain, even if he does not use the Extreme Dao Aura of the Sword, his strength is not weaker than that of Yunli Controller.

However, if he can't defeat Yunli's master, it will be difficult for him to take the Tianyu Baolian.

"Then let's expose our strength!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Besides, he can't never reveal his strength.

As a result, Ye Tian immediately cast the Extreme Sword Dao Blade, carrying the breath of the Extreme Sword Dao.

Of course, Ye Tian did not show the power of the rudimentary form of the Sword Extreme, only a little fur.

If the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword is revealed, it may be possible to severely damage the Yunli Controller with a single move, or even kill him.

Tear and pull!

The endless time and space were torn apart by the Extreme Creation Sword Dao Blade, and the Yunli Controller was still the same as before, using a defensive Extreme Creation Perfection Technique to contend with it.

But suddenly, his own defense was directly torn apart, the golden light of the Extreme Creation on his body was also torn, and the body of control was directly broken.

At this moment, Yun Li's controller was injured, and the injury was not light.

What's more, the injuries on his body cannot be healed instantly.

"The breath of the sword of the Extreme Dao !!"

Yun Li's knowledge is not shallow, so he recognized it, and he was immediately shocked.

Ye Tian actually comprehended the fur of the Extreme Dao of the Sword, how could this be possible!

How long has Ye Tiancai been a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, how could he have comprehended the Extreme Dao of the Sword so quickly?

And.

According to his understanding, it seems that the Daoless Tower does not have a perfect treasure about the Extreme Dao of the Sword!

"Run!"

Yunli didn't dare to fight Ye Tian, otherwise it was really possible to fall.

Although this body is a will clone, he doesn't want to fall, otherwise he won't be able to condense the will clone for a long time, and he can't enter here again.

Yun Li fled from the controller, and Ye Tian did not chase after him.

He came directly to Tianyu Baolian, carefully took Tianyu Baolian, and immediately put it away.

In the following days, Ye Tian found more good things, and he also fought with other half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm, so his strength was gradually spread by other half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm.

All of a sudden, many half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm knew that Ye Tian had mastered the fur of the Extreme Dao of the Sword.

this day.

Ye Tian is ready to go to the second-layer area, mainly because there are not many resources in the first-layer area, and staying here is undoubtedly a waste of time.

Besides, he had already gained enough, and there was no need to stay in the first layer of the Extreme Gold Mountain.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian went to the second layer area.

Passing through a golden light curtain, Ye Tian came to the second layer area.

The area of the second layer is called the Ten Thousand Things Cage, and the All Things Cage that every half-step perfect master of the Creation Realm enters is different, and it will hardly come into contact with each other.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian entered a cage of all things, which was like a void, and in this void was imprisoned an extremely terrifying creature.

The creature was restrained, but judging from the aura on its body, it had the strength of a perfect controller.

"There is a half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm, it seems that the Extreme Creation Golden Mountain has opened again, damn the Lord of the Extreme Creation!!"

The creature roared wildly.

Ye Tian used his copying talent to probe this creature and learned its name, Swallowing Heaven Spirit, and it also had a perfect-level ancestral endowment on it, Lei Yin!

At this moment, the shackles of the Heaven Swallowing Sect disappeared.

Ye Tian needed to defeat the Heaven Swallowing Void in order to obtain the Extreme Creation Material Reward, and then he could enter the third layer of the Void.

Just as the Heaven Swallowing Sect attacked, Ye Tian directly broke out with the strongest blow, urging the Extreme Sword Dao Blade with the power of the Extreme Dao Prototype of the Sword.

Poof!

The Extreme Sword Dao Blade tore through the Heaven Swallowing Sect's body, instantly battering it.

Just a little bit, the Sky Swallower fell.

If it weren't for the power of the cage of all things protecting it at the critical moment, it would be dead.

"Extreme Power !!"

Swallowing Heaven was also dumbfounded.

How can a casual half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Realm master the power of the Extreme Dao!

If it weren't for the cage of all things, it would be dead.

Immediately, the cage of all things restrained it again, and it was going to be a long time before it could recover from its injuries.

And after Ye Tian defeated the Heaven Swallowing Force, the Prison of All Things gave Ye Tian a piece of the Extreme Creation Substance.

I saw a bottle of Extreme Purple Liquid appear in front of Ye Tian, such an Extreme Purple Liquid was not bad, and there were quite a few of them, and they were put away by Ye Tian.

Then, a portal appeared, which was the passage to the third level of the Void.

Ye Tian didn't linger here, and directly entered the third layer of the void.

......

The third layer of the void, in the depths of endless time and space, a list stood there.

That's the gold list!

The true demonic existence among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm on the Gold List is a high-level perfect treasure that belongs to the Lord of Extreme Creation and is placed here.

Anyone who enters the Extreme Creation Gold List can be ranked on it, get the treatment of the title of the Extreme Gold List, and be known by the half-step perfect controller of the Creation Extreme Realm in later generations.

Moreover, every half-step perfect controller of the Extreme Creation Realm can cultivate in the Void within the Extreme Creation Gold List, and can cultivate for 100,000 eternal years.

The internal void cultivation environment of the Extreme Gold List is very good, and it can improve the understanding and assist in the changes of the enlightenment path.

Of course, the Lord of Extreme Creation has also transformed the Extreme Creation Gold List, and whoever enters the Extreme Creation Gold List can obtain a batch of Extreme Creation Materials, and in these 100,000 eternal years, if the progress is rapid, you can also get more Extreme Creation Materials.

"It's a bit like the Blood Battle List!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In fact, the Blood Battle List is similar to the Gold List, and the two are about the same.

However, there are a large number of names of half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm recorded on the Gold List, and it is extremely difficult to break into the top 100, and I don't know how many amazing half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm have come here.

There are even some half-step perfect controllers who can obviously improve quickly, but they deliberately do not improve, and only after entering here do they start to improve, and the speed of progress is naturally fast, and they can get more extreme creation substances.

Ye Tian was confident that he would enter the top 100 of the Extreme Creation Gold List, but he had no hope of reaching the first place, after all, among the half-step perfect controllers of the Extreme Creation Realm in the past, who knew how many powerhouses who deliberately suppressed their strength just to get more Extreme Creation Substances here.

Of course.

Ye Tian didn't care about the ranking on this list, this time he could get more pole-making materials, just improve his strength.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian walked towards the gold list.

And when he walked towards the Extreme Gold List, the power of the high-level perfect treasure was suppressed.

It can be said that there is not enough strength to even enter the qualification to enter the gold list.
